prompt: Clear the Terminal screen (Cmd+K, or run the 'clear' command, or send the ANSI reset). Then write the text 'screen-cleared' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/285-confirm.txt to confirm. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal clear_screen' followed by cerebellum 'terminal run "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/kinbench && echo screen-cleared > ~/Desktop/kinbench/285-confirm.txt"'.
